title: Kilrock Mould Remover Brush-On Gel 2 x 250ml - Eliminates Mould & Mildew - Accurately Target Areas of Mould Growth - For use in Baths, Showers, Corners, Edges, Grout Lines
features: TARGETED BRUSH-ON GEL FORMULA - Designed for precise application to black mould and mildew on grout lines, corners, seals, and edges.
FAST & EFFECTIVE MOULD REMOVAL - Works in as little as 30 minutes to eliminate even the most stubborn mould stains, including black spots.
IDEAL FOR BATHROOMS & SHOWERS - Safely use on tiles, grout, sinks, and bath seals – the go-to solution for concentrated mould removal.
PRECISION BRUSH APPLICATOR - Allows for controlled application without mess or waste, targeting hard-to-reach mould areas.
DESIGNED FOR CONFIDENCE - Developed for use on a range of bathroom surfaces – just avoid natural stone and always test a small area first.
description: Product Description Kilrock Bathroom Cleaners Mould Remover Spray Mould Remover Brush-On Gel Grout Cleaner Eliminates Mould & Mildew Fast-acting spray that destroys mould, mildew, and black mould. Eliminates Mould & Mildew Works in as little as 30 minutes to eliminate even the most stubborn mould stain Professional Grout Cleaner Effectively removes grime, mould, limescale and dirt from tile grout lines Multi Surface Perfect for bathrooms, showers, kitchens, windows, garden ornaments and more. Ideal for Bathrooms & Showers Safely use on tiles, grout, sinks, and bath seals – the go-to solution. Ideal for Bathrooms & Showers Use on tiled surfaces, floors, and walls to maintain clean, hygienic grout lines
